exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.instructions: Lie on bench, grip bar slightly wider than shoulder width. Lower bar to chest, then press up to full extension.

exercises.name: Incline Bench Press
exercises.instructions: Set bench to 30-45 degree angle. Press bar from upper chest to full extension.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.instructions: Set bench to 30-45 degree angle. Start with dumbbells at shoulder height, palms facing forward. Press dumbbells up and together, then lower with control.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Flyes
exercises.instructions: Lie on bench holding dumbbells above chest. Lower arms out to sides with slight bend in elbows, then squeeze chest to bring back up.

exercises.name: Push-ups
exercises.instructions: Start in plank position. Lower chest to floor, then push back up to starting position.

exercises.name: Cable Crossover
exercises.instructions: Stand between cable machines with handles at chest height. Bring arms together in front of body, squeezing chest.

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart, bar over mid-foot. Hinge at hips, grip bar, and stand up by extending hips and knees.

exercises.name: Pull-ups
exercises.instructions: Hang from bar with palms facing away. Pull body up until chin clears bar, then lower with control.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.instructions: Sit at lat pulldown machine, grip bar wider than shoulders. Pull bar down to upper chest, squeezing lats.

exercises.name: Barbell Row
exercises.instructions: Bend at hips, back straight, grip bar. Pull bar to lower chest/upper abs, squeezing shoulder blades together.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Row
exercises.instructions: Support body on bench with one hand and knee. Pull dumbbell up to hip, squeezing lat.

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.instructions: Stand facing cable machine at face height. Pull rope toward face, separating hands and squeezing rear delts.

exercises.name: Squat
exercises.instructions: Stand with bar on upper back/shoulders. Bend knees and hips to lower until thighs parallel to floor, then stand.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.instructions: Sit in leg press machine, feet shoulder-width on platform. Lower weight by bending knees, then press back up.

exercises.name: Lunges
exercises.instructions: Step forward with one leg, lowering hips until both knees are at 90 degrees. Push back to starting position.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.instructions: Lie face down on leg curl machine. Curl heels toward glutes, then lower with control.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.instructions: Sit in leg extension machine. Extend legs fully, then lower with control.

exercises.name: Calf Raise
exercises.instructions: Stand with balls of feet on raised platform. Rise up on toes, then lower below parallel.

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.instructions: Stand with bar at upper chest. Press bar overhead to full extension, then lower with control.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.instructions: Stand holding dumbbells at sides. Raise arms out to sides until parallel to floor, then lower.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Front Raise
exercises.instructions: Stand holding dumbbells in front of thighs. Raise one or both arms forward to shoulder height, then lower.

exercises.name: Arnold Press
exercises.instructions: Sit with dumbbells at shoulder height, palms facing you. Rotate palms outward as you press overhead.

exercises.name: Upright Row
exercises.instructions: Hold bar at thigh level. Pull bar straight up toward chin, leading with elbows.

exercises.name: Barbell Curl
exercises.instructions: Stand holding bar with palms up. Curl bar toward chest, keeping elbows stationary, then lower.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Curl
exercises.instructions: Stand holding dumbbells at sides with palms forward. Curl weights toward shoulders, then lower.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.instructions: Stand holding dumbbells with neutral grip (palms facing each other). Curl toward shoulders.

exercises.name: Preacher Curl
exercises.instructions: Sit at preacher curl bench, arms resting on pad. Curl weight up, squeezing biceps at top.

exercises.name: Tricep Pushdown
exercises.instructions: Stand at cable machine with rope or bar attachment. Keep elbows at sides, extend arms fully downward.

exercises.name: Skull Crushers
exercises.instructions: Lie on bench holding bar or dumbbells above chest. Lower weight toward forehead by bending elbows, then extend.

exercises.name: Dips
exercises.instructions: Support body on dip bars with arms extended. Lower body by bending elbows, then push back up.

exercises.name: Close Grip Bench Press
exercises.instructions: Lie on bench, grip bar with hands shoulder-width apart. Lower to chest, then press up focusing on triceps.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.instructions: Support body on forearms and toes, keeping body straight from head to heels. Hold position.

exercises.name: Crunches
exercises.instructions: Lie on back with knees bent. Lift shoulders off floor by contracting abs, then lower.

exercises.name: Leg Raise
exercises.instructions: Lie on back or hang from bar. Lift legs to 90 degrees or higher, then lower with control.

exercises.name: Russian Twist
exercises.instructions: Sit with knees bent, lean back slightly. Rotate torso side to side, optionally holding weight.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.instructions: Lie on back with arms and legs extended upward. Lower opposite arm and leg while keeping back flat.

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Raise
exercises.instructions: Hang from pull-up bar. Lift knees toward chest, then lower with control.

exercises.name: Treadmill Running
exercises.instructions: Run on treadmill at desired speed and incline. Maintain good posture and controlled breathing.

exercises.name: Stationary Bike
exercises.instructions: Pedal at consistent pace, adjusting resistance as needed. Maintain steady breathing.

exercises.name: Rowing Machine
exercises.instructions: Drive through legs, lean back slightly, then pull handle to lower ribs. Return to starting position smoothly.

exercises.name: Elliptical
exercises.instructions: Maintain smooth elliptical motion with arms and legs. Adjust resistance and incline as desired.

exercises.name: Burpees
exercises.instructions: From standing, drop to push-up position, do push-up, jump feet forward, then jump up with arms overhead.

exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
exercises.instructions: Start in plank position. Alternate bringing knees toward chest rapidly while maintaining plank.

exercises.name: Jumping Jacks
exercises.instructions: Jump while spreading legs and raising arms overhead, then jump back to starting position.

exercises.name: Box Jumps
exercises.instructions: Stand facing box or platform. Jump onto box landing softly with both feet, then step down.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.instructions: Stand holding bar at thigh level. Hinge at hips lowering bar along legs until feeling stretch in hamstrings, then stand.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust
exercises.instructions: Sit with upper back against bench, bar across hips. Thrust hips upward, squeezing glutes at top.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.instructions: Stand with rear foot elevated on bench. Lower into lunge position, then drive back up.

exercises.name: Front Squat
exercises.instructions: Hold bar across front of shoulders. Squat down keeping torso upright, then stand.

exercises.name: Hack Squat
exercises.instructions: Use hack squat machine, feet on platform. Lower by bending knees, then press back up.
